title: tephrosia spinosa
intro: Tephrosia spinosa, also known as the thorny tephrosia or devil's thorn, is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia spinosa include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Tephrosia spinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
